understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle. In each level, you must place every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+') simultaneously to win the level, then advance to the next. The game ends successfully when all levels are cleared.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is initiated by selecting a piece (likely via click) and then clicking a target tile. The piece tries to move to that tile if the path is clear of obstacles; otherwise, the action has no effect and the piece stays. Walls and other obstacles block movement. No pushing of other pieces or additional mechanics were observed in this run. Repeatedly clicking the same blocked position suggests the selected piece could not reach the target due to an obstruction.
